description: 1. The FESIM2 sea-ice component simulates sea-ice dynamics. Sea ice thermodynamics (heat transfer through sea ice, melting, freezing etc) is handled by the atmosphere model ICON-A on the atmosphere grid. 2. FESIM2 solves the elastic-viscous-plastic (EVP) equations for sea ice evolution. FESIM2 operates with a single sea-ice layer (i.e. there is no "vertical grid"). 3. Fine-tuning of the ocean heat content was done using the parameters governing sea ice albedo
